section_miscategorizations.text: The right shoulder x-ray also reveals a palpable radial pulse.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A palpable radial pulse is a physical exam finding, not an imaging (x-ray) finding. While it belongs in the Objective section, its wording here incorrectly attributes it to the x-ray, which could mildly confuse readers about the source of the finding rather than the section itself.
